response.justification: The candidate's career has been focused on web, mobile, and backend services development with minimal C++ exposure (6 months at National Instruments) and zero capital markets or fixed income domain experience. The role requires 5–10 years of strong hands-on C++ on Windows with SQL Server/Oracle, neither of which are evident in the resume. The candidate's strengths in communication, CI/CD, and backend systems do not bridge the substantial gap in the mandatory technical and domain requirements.
strengths: Excellent communication and teaching skills demonstrated through multiple workshops, talks, and educational initiatives
Solid CI/CD and DevOps infrastructure experience from Altom Consulting, including GitLab management and deployment systems
Full-stack capability and ability to learn multiple programming languages and technology stacks across diverse domains
concerns: Only 6 months of documented C++ experience (requires 5–10 years); career trajectory is web/mobile/backend-focused, not systems programming
No mention of Windows platform development, SQL Server, or Oracle; listed SQL experience is vague and includes MySQL/MongoDB, not required databases
Complete absence of capital markets, investment banking, fixed income, or financial derivatives domain knowledge—a mandatory requirement
